description: The main commercial street of Gulangyu Island, featuring a variety of Minnan-style snacks and souvenir shops.
A maritime garden blending Chinese and Western styles, home to the Piano Museum with stunning scenery.
The green lung of the city, an ecological park for birdwatching and flower viewing, offering views of the cross-sea bridge.
The busiest commercial street in Xiamen, known for its arcade-style architecture, a hub for shopping and dining.
A modern seaside resort area with well-equipped beach facilities and expansive, magnificent sea views.
The site of the Zheng Chenggong Statue, a coastal park with scenic views and a memorial to the national hero.
One of the most beautiful university campuses in China, seamlessly combining red-brick Jiageng architecture with modern campus design.
A natural beach favored by Xiamen locals, featuring fine sand, clear waters, and a relatively tranquil atmosphere.
A large park showcasing the essence of domestic and international garden art, with rich wetland ecosystems.
A famous ancient Buddhist temple in Minnan, nestled at the foot of Wulao Peak, with a long history and thriving incense offerings.
